creator: michael@dynamine.net
text:
Current gd port (just cvsup'd /usr/ports a few minutes ago) is for 1.8.1; turns out it's a symlink to 1.8.2 at http://www.boutell.com/gd/http, thus breaking the CHECKSUM and the make install procedure.

Fix: 

Makefile needs to be updated :-)
How-To-Repeat: Update the ports collection, cd /usr/ports/graphics/gd; make install
